title: Universal SDD UI PIM Meta-Schema
description: SDD Production Line: Semantic Intent Spec based on Web Components and Contract Triangulation.

id.description: Unique identifier for the element. Used for state management and DOM mapping.

semantic_variant.description: Optional hint for the Jig (e.g., Shadcn/UI). Examples: 'primary', 'dangerous', 'accordion', 'tabs', 'modal'.

label.description: The display name or i18n key for the element.

data_ref.description: Contract Link: Must map to a specific operationId in api-contracts/openapi.yaml.

behavior_ref.description: Contract Link: Must map to a specific Scenario title in behavior-specs/*.feature.

children.description: Recursive structure to represent nested UI trees.

ui_id.description: Unique ID for this UI specification file.

domain_module.description: The target domain module. Must match the Package Name in UML Domain Models.

root_element.description: The single entry point for the UI component tree.
